Item Class: Charms
Rarity: Unique
Arakaali's Gift
Antidote Charm
--------
Lasts 3 Seconds
Consumes 20 of 40 Charges on use
Currently has 0 Charges
Grants Immunity to Poison
--------
Requires: Level 24
--------
Item Level: 79
--------
{ Implicit Modifier }
Used when you become Poisoned — Unscalable Value
--------
{ Unique Modifier — Charm, Life }
Recover Life equal to 18(15-20)% of Mana Flask's Recovery Amount when used
{ Unique Modifier — Charm, Mana }
Recover Mana equal to 15(15-20)% of Life Flask's Recovery Amount when used
--------
Devotees of the Goddess of Lust
needed never fear her sting.
--------
Used automatically when condition is met. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refill at Wells or by killing monsters.
